channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Giancarlo Stanton hits go-ahead homer in the eighth, Yankees beat Royals 3-2 in Game 3 of the ALDS
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — Giancarlo Stanton hit a go-ahead homer in the eighth inning amid a battle of bullpens, and the New York Yankees beat the Kansas City Royals 3-2 on Wednesday night in Game 3 of their AL Division Series at Kauffman Stadium.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Patrick Mahomes goes wild in suite, screams in former teammate's face as Royals tie ALDS game vs. Yankees
item.description: Patrick Mahomes was at the Kansas City Royals' ALDS Game 3 against the New York Yankees, and he screamed in the face of Gehrig Dieter, a Yankees fan, after the Royals tied it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: PGA Golfers impressed with Black Desert Resort
item.description: IVINS, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - The PGA Tour returns to Utah for the first time since 1963 when the Black Desert Championship tees off Thursday in Ivins, Utah. Most of the 132 golfers in the tournament have never played in Utah before, and they have been impressed with the course at Black Desert Resort.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Stefanos Tsitsipas refuses to play in meltdown at Shanghai Masters, accuses umpire of bias
item.description: Greek tennis player Stefanos Tsitsipas refused to continue play at the Shanghai Masters Wednesday after getting into a heated discussion with an umpire he accused of being biased.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: California lawmakers write letter urging schools to pay athletes directly
item.description: (KRON) -- A pair of California state senators wrote a letter on Wednesday urging schools in the Golden State to change how collegiate athletes are paid.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: A 4-1 start has created long-starved hope and optimism around the Washington Commanders
item.description: ASHBURN, Va. (AP) — Jayden Daniels has one of the best-selling jerseys in the NFL. Forgive the rookie quarterback for not noticing just how many Washington Commanders fans are now wearing his name and No. 5 on their backs.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Tigers blank Guardians 3-0 in ALDS with clutch hitting and strong pitching, taking 2-1 series lead
item.description: Riley Greene and Spencer Torkelson each drove in a run, and six pitchers combined to lift the Detroit Tigers to a 3-0 win over Cleveland Guardians and a 2-1 lead in their AL Division Series.
item.dc:creator: Larry Lage, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Big Game Bound: Lions hunt for revenge in Cowboys rematch
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS – NFL games are as competitive as they’ve ever been with more games (47) decided by seven-or-fewer points through the first five weeks than any other season in league history.
item.dc:creator: Phil Nardiello - Senior Sports Producer, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rodgers says allegations that he played a role in Saleh's firing as Jets coach are 'patently false'
item.description: Aaron Rodgers insisted he played no role in the firing of Robert Saleh as the New York Jets coach and called such allegations “patently false.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Troy Aikman says he heard Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce are engaged: 'I might have broke the story'
item.description: Troy Aikman slipped up Monday night when he referred to Taylor Swift as Travis Kelce's "missus," but he says he heard a rumor the two are engaged.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jason Kelce fires back at ESPN analyst's wild rule-change suggestion: 'Stick to draft analysis'
item.description: Jason Kelce called Mel Kiper Jr.'s take about outlawing two high safety formations in the NFL "embarrassing" during a recent episode of "New Heights.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: SEC means more ... upsets? Three top 10 teams fall, led by Vanderbilt's vanquishing of Alabama
item.description: Lane Kiffin wasn’t ready to talk about his own game yet. The Mississippi coach fixated instead on the final moments of Vanderbilt’s stunning upset of then-No. 1 Alabama. “Sorry, I mean this is a once-in-a-lifetime thing going on,” Kiffin told reporters after the Rebels’ win over South Carolina.
item.dc:creator: JOHN ZENOR, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: How much are Padres tickets?
item.description: Are you hoping to cheer on the Padres from the stands of Petco Park for Game 4 of the National League Division Series?
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Patriots' Jabrill Peppers hits commissioner's exempt list after arrest
item.description: New England Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers was placed on the commissioner's exempt list on Wednesday after his arrest in Massachusetts.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers is placed on commissioner's exempt list after his arrest
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. (AP) — The NFL has placed New England Patriots safety Jabrill Peppers on the exempt list while he goes through the legal process following his arrest on charges that he shoved his girlfriend’s head into the wall and choked her.
item.dc:creator: JIMMY GOLEN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-NFL All-Pro puts pressure on Aaron Rodgers, Jets players after Robert Saleh’s firing: ‘Still gotta perform'
item.description: The New York Jets fired head coach Robert Saleh on Tuesday, but a former All-Pro does not think he is to blame for what has gone wrong with the team.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to watch 49ers vs. Seahawks on Thursday Night Football
item.description: The San Francisco 49ers square off against division rivals the Seattle Seahawks at 5:15 p.m. PDT on Thursday, Oct. 10.
item.dc:creator: Pueng Vongs, The Mercury News

item.title: Blackhawks' rally falls short in season-opening 5-2 loss in Utah
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) — The Utah Hockey Club got off to a great start in its new hometown Tuesday night. The Blackhawks' start, meanwhile, was less than ideal. Utah never trailed in a season opener, building a 3-0 lead before holding off a Chicago rally for a 5-2 victory.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Utah HC players understand significance of first NHL game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - No matter what happens this season, there will never be another first NHL game for the Utah Hockey Club It's just game 1 of 82, but the Utah HC players know how historic tonight's game against the Chicago Blackhawks at the Delta Center will be.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utes to play baseball at Smith's Ballpark next season
item.description: The University of Utah has partnered up with Salt Lake City and the Salt Lake Bees to have the Utes play baseball at Smith's Ballpark during the 2025 season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Viral disease outbreak leads to several horses being euthanized at Los Alamitos
item.description: An outbreak of a potentially fatal viral disease at Los Alamitos Race Course has led to seven race horses being euthanized, officials have confirmed. Announced in an advisory on Thursday, the California Horse Racing Board said it was notified of an outbreak of Equine Infectious Anemia on Sept.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Leading in a new league: Oceanside golfer wins top spot in nine matches
item.description: “Medalist of the match is basically between the two teams, the individual who has the lowest score,” explained Oceanside High School golfer Kassidy Stevens.
item.dc:creator: Frank Jefferson, Fox 5

item.title: Backlash over San Jose State University transgender volleyball player 'isn't about sports,' advocates say
item.description: (KRON) -- Four teams forfeited matches against the San Jose State University women's volleyball team since a lawsuit was filed on behalf of several NCAA athletes, including SJSU's team captain. According to the lawsuit filed on September 23, one of SJSU's volleyball players is transgender.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: Ticket stub from Michael Jordan's NBA debut, 1998 game-worn jersey autograph card hit auction
item.description: Two rare Michael Jordan items, including a 1984 Bulls box office stub and a 1998 UD Basketball card, are up for auction in New York through October 19, along with other sports memorabilia including a 1914 Babe Ruth Orioles photo and a 1951 Bowman Mantle card.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Utah State Volleyball cancels match against San Jose State, becomes fourth team to do so
item.description: The Utah State women's volleyball team has canceled their Oct. 23 match against San Jose State becoming the fourth team this year to do so, according to reports and tweets from state officials. This comes amid a swirling controversy over a SJSU player's gender.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Mahon, ABC 4
